title: Mastering the Sauté
description: Learn the technique of sautéing for quick, flavorful cooking.

steps.instruction: Gather your ingredients: thinly sliced vegetables (like onions, peppers) or small pieces of protein (chicken, shrimp).
Place a skillet over medium-high heat. Let it get hot before adding oil.
Add a tablespoon of cooking oil (like olive or vegetable oil). It should shimmer slightly.
Carefully add your ingredients to the hot pan in a single layer. Do not overcrowd the pan! Cook in batches if necessary.
Stir or toss the ingredients frequently to ensure even cooking and browning.
Cook until ingredients are tender-crisp and lightly browned. Season with salt and pepper.
Remove from heat and serve immediately.

safety_notes: Be careful with hot oil; it can splatter.
Do not leave the cooking pan unattended.
